title: Staff / role directory (GATED)
description: Authorized-first staff directory so teacher-profile handoffs can resolve a role to a real person. OFF by default (see staff-data-policy.md). Committed files are PLACEHOLDERS only; real data lives in staff.local.json (gitignored). Minimum-necessary fields; every record carries provenance + an authorized flag.

role.description: normalized role key, e.g. case_manager, assistant_principal, counselor, nurse, co_teacher, department_head, teacher

work_email.description: minimum-necessary; local-only unless from an authorized source

authorized.description: true only when sourced under an explicit authorization

consent.description: how/when consent or authorization was recorded

authorized.description: deployment-level STAFF_INGEST_AUTHORIZED state at write time
